name: I'm in an enormous cave
hints: An enormous cave with a magnificent fountain and a stone tablet. The fountain is holy - do not enter it!
EXAMINE FOUNTAIN to see the strange liquid inside. The tablet has inscriptions. Do NOT go in the fountain - it is holy and you will be struck down.
FILL CHALICE at the fountain to collect the sacred liquid for the King. DO NOT GO FOUNTAIN - you will be killed by a thunderbolt for desecrating it.
Fill the gold chalice here, then bring it back to the King in the palace. EAST returns to the cave. WARNING: entering the fountain directly means instant death.

effects:
Message: I've desecrated the holy fountain.
I'm struck down by a THUNDERBOLT!

notes: Deepest cave with the magnificent fountain full of strange liquid and a stone tablet. FILL CHALICE here to collect the liquid for the King. WARNING: GO FOUNTAIN causes instant death by thunderbolt (desecrating a holy place). Use FILL CHALICE instead. East returns to the cave (room 35).
